tagline: Understand the state of your mind.
notDiagnosis: This is not a diagnosis. It is a first step.

lowMood.message: Your mind is tired. That is real.

tier1.heading: You are taking care of your mind.
tier1.description: These small practices can help you feel better.

resources.title: Breathing Exercise
resources.description: A 5-minute breathing practice to reduce stress.

resources.title: Journaling Prompt
resources.description: How did you feel today? Write one sentence.

resources.title: Understanding Your Feelings
resources.description: Feelings are temporary. Recognizing them is the first step.

tier2.heading: Your mind is tired. That is real.
tier2.description: You are not alone. These resources can help.

resources.title: Peer Stories
resources.description: Others like you have experienced this too.

resources.title: 7-Day Mood Guide
resources.description: A small daily practice to understand your mind.

tier3.heading: You are going through a difficult time. Support is available.
tier3.description: Talking to someone helps. These organizations can support you.

resources.title: TPO Nepal
resources.description: TPO Nepal provides free mental health support.

tier4.heading: You need support right now.
tier4.safetyMessage: You are not alone. Help is available.

letter.prompt: One sentence for yourself, next week.

nav.anonExplanation: You are currently using the app natively without an account. All features are fully unlocked. However, if you clear your browser history or switch phones, you will lose your check-in tracking history.
nav.dataSecured: Your data is permanently secured and linked to your account. You can safely access your check-in history from any device.

nav.understandMind: Understand the state of your mind.
nav.takingCare: You are taking care of yourself.
nav.supportAvailable: Support is available. You are not alone.

q1.text: Lately, does nothing feel worth doing, even things you used to like?

q2.text: Do you feel drained without reason?

q3.text: How has your sleep been lately?

q4.text: Have you noticed changes in appetite?

q5.text: Do the people around you understand how you feel?

q6.text: When you think about your future, how do you feel?

q7.text: How do you feel about your exam results?

options.text: Cannot bear to think about it

q8.text: When you imagine your future, what do you see?

q9.text: Do you sometimes feel like everything would be easier if you weren't here?

q10.text: Have you thought about hurting yourself?
